testcase.name: Happy path generated from cURL

failure.message: Missing token for key: API_TOKEN (env or properties)

testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Missing token for key: API_TOKEN (env or properties) at support.AuthContext.setBearerFromEnv(AuthContext.java:31) at steps.CommonSteps.useBearerTokenFromEnv(CommonSteps.java:261) at ✽.I use bearer token from env "API_TOKEN"(file:///Users/mohammaddaabes/Documents/api/src/test/resources/features/generated/post_admin_v2_customers.feature:4)
testcase.system-out: Given the API base url is "${BASE_URL}".....................................passed And I use bearer token from env "API_TOKEN".................................failed And I add header "accept" with value 'application/json'.....................skipped And I add header "accept-language" with value 'ar'..........................skipped And I add header "content-type" with value 'application/json'...............skipped And I add header "pragma" with value 'no-cache'.............................skipped And I add header "s-source" with value 'automation'.........................skipped When I POST to "/admin/v2/customers" with json body:........................skipped Then the response status should be 200......................................skipped Then the response header "Content-Type" should equal "application/json".....skipped

testcase.name: Missing token returns 401

failure.message: Missing token for key: API_TOKEN (env or properties)
